role_summary: the loan audit officer audits loan portfolios to ensure compliance with lending policies,  rbi norms, and internal controls.
responsibilities: • audit loan d ocumentation and sanction processes   • verify compliance with rbi and internal credit policies   • review asset classification and provisioning   • identify irregularities and control gaps   • prepare audit reports and follow -up actions   • support regulatory inspections and  reviews
qualifications: • qualified ca   • knowledge of banking audits and loan operations   • strong observation and reporting skills
